case_title: GARY ROBERT MAUPIN VS. BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF S.F.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAUPIN, GARY ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF S.F. $663.34 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $663.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-15-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GARY ROBERT MAUPIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY DBA YELLOW CAB REPRESENTED BY FREDERICK LEIN, DRIVER MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT RECESSES AT 2:50P.M. TO ALLOW FOR DEFNDANT TO OBTAIN A COPY OF THE MEDALLION LEASE BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COPY OF SAMPLE LEASE IS EMAILED TO WTRUPEK@SFTC.ORG AND PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT AND IS VIEWED IN OPEN COURT. COURT RESUMES AT 3:10 P.M. THE COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-15-2019 AT 3:30 P.M. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED TO PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2019 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 (PER ACCESS - FILED AT REQUEST OF LITIGANT) FILED BY MAUPIN, GARY ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FREDERICK LEIN, DRIVER MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF S.F.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF S.F.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/15/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAUPIN, GARY ROBERT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED JUL-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION DBA YELLOW CAB OF S.F.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GARY ROBERT MAUPIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORP DBA YELLOW CAB IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID HANDLEY RISK MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
